articles.title_en: Sodeco asks the Japanese Cabinet to remove the ceiling on oil prices from Russia
articles.lead_en: Due to the G7 policy, this is impossible to do now, noted company president Hidehiro Muramatsu
articles.title_raw: Sodeco просит кабмин Японии убрать потолок цен на нефть из России
articles.lead_raw: Из-за политики G7 сейчас сделать это невозможно, отметил президент компании Хидэхиро Мурамацу

articles.title_en: The Indian Foreign Ministry called Russia a reliable oil supplier
articles.lead_en: The head of the department, Subrahmanyam Jaishankar, noted that the country purchases oil based on price and availability.
articles.title_raw: В МИД Индии назвали Россию надежным поставщиком нефти
articles.lead_raw: Глава ведомства Субраманьям Джайшанкар отметил, что страна закупает нефть исходя из цены и доступности

articles.title_en: The Russian Federation noted the need for uninterrupted supplies of fuel for the agricultural sector
articles.lead_en: At the meeting, which was chaired by Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak, a set of measures was presented aimed at ensuring priority saturation of the domestic market with petroleum products
articles.title_raw: В РФ отметили необходимость бесперебойных поставок топлива для АПК
articles.lead_raw: На совещании, которое провел вице-премьер Александр Новак, был представлен комплекс мер, направленных на обеспечение приоритетного насыщения внутреннего рынка нефтепродуктами

articles.title_en: Oil workers reported on working to maximize refinery utilization
articles.lead_en: In addition to Deputy Prime Minister of the Russian Federation Alexander Novak, the meeting was attended by the Minister of Agriculture Oksana Lut, representatives of the Ministry of Economic Development, the Ministry of Energy, the Federal Antimonopoly Service, the Ministry of T
articles.title_raw: Нефтяники доложили о работе над максимальной загрузкой НПЗ
articles.lead_raw: Помимо вице-премьера РФ Александра Новака в совещании приняли участие министр сельского хозяйства Оксана Лут, представители Минэкономразвития, Минэнерго, ФАС, Минтранса и другие

articles.title_en: Russian budget revenues above $513.5 bln in 2025 — PM
articles.lead_en: The non-oil and gas component already consistently exceeds three-quarters of all revenues, Mikhail Mishustin said

articles.title_en: Russia remained top oil supplier to India, China in April — OPEC
articles.lead_en: Oil imports to China in April fell to the lowest level since October 2021, from 11.76 million bpd to 9.32 million bpd

articles.title_en: The United States extended permission for nuclear energy transactions with Russian banks
articles.lead_en: The document applies to the Bank of Russia, NCC, Alfa Bank, Vnesheconombank, VTB, Gazprombank, Rosbank, Sberbank, Sovcombank, Zenit, Otkritie and St. Petersburg.

articles.title_en: Investments, IT and energy will be discussed at the Russia-ASEAN business forum
articles.lead_en: The program will open on June 17 in Kazan

articles.title_en: Former German Foreign Minister: Putin sometimes knows the Germans better than they know themselves
articles.lead_en: Sigmar Gabriel noted that the Russian leader “watches German television, reads German newspapers”

articles.lead_raw: Зигмар Габриэль отметил, что российский лидер "смотрит немецкое телевидение, читает немецкие газеты"

articles.title_en: Russia lowered oil production in May by 9,000 bpd — OPEC
articles.lead_en: According to the report, Russia’s oil production was below the OPEC+ target with compensations and voluntary cuts taken into account by 690,000 bpd

articles.title_en: In Russia, a state prize was awarded for a method of oil production in difficult conditions
articles.lead_en: It was awarded to senior adviser to Promsyreimport, Doctor of Technical Sciences Oleg Zhdaneev, chief designer of the Titan-Barricades production center Igor Kovshov and specialist from the Moscow Institute of Thermal Engineering Elena Korsa-Vavilova
articles.title_raw: В России присудили госпремию за способ добычи нефти в сложных условиях
articles.lead_raw: Ее удостоены старший советник "Промсырьеимпорта", доктор технических наук Олег Жданеев, главный конструктор производственного центра "Титан-Баррикады" Игорь Ковшов и специалист Московского института теплотехники Елена Корса-Вавилова

articles.title_en: Reuters: Ukrainian drone attack forces Kuibyshev oil refinery in Russia to halt operations
articles.lead_en: Ukraine’s drone attack on Samara on June 10 forced the Kuibyshev oil refinery to halt crude processing, two industry sources told Reuters.
articles.title_raw: Reuters: Ukrainian drone attack forces Kuibyshev oil refinery in Russia to halt operations

articles.title_en: ‘Waiting in line is pointless’: Fuel trucks fail to reach Sevastopol, Russian-installed governor says
articles.lead_en: Officials in occupied Sevastopol failed to issue a new batch of QR codes for fuel purchases on the evening of June 10, Russian-installed governor Mikhail Razvozhayev said. He blamed the disruption on fuel supply problems: “Fuel trucks were unable to reach the city last night.”
articles.title_raw: ‘Waiting in line is pointless’: Fuel trucks fail to reach Sevastopol, Russian-installed governor says
articles.lead_raw: Officials in occupied Sevastopol failed to issue a new batch of QR codes for fuel purchases on the evening of June 10, Russian-installed governor Mikhail Razvozhayev said. He blamed the disruption on fuel supply problems: “Fuel trucks were unable to reach the city last night.”

articles.title_en: Russia resumes wheat exports to Madagascar
articles.lead_en: According to the Agroexport Federal Center, in the first five months of 2026, Russia exported more than 30,000 tons of wheat

articles.title_en: FSB foils terrorist attack on Russian Defense Ministry official
articles.lead_en: According to the security agency, "a foreign national born in 1990, tasked by Ukrainian intelligence agencies with shooting a Russian serviceman, was identified and detained in the Moscow Region"

articles.title_en: Russia downs more than 330 Ukrainian drones overnight; apartment building damaged, oil refinery catches fire
articles.lead_en: Debris from Ukrainian drones struck an apartment building in Krasnodar overnight on June 11, Krasnodar Governor Veniamin Kondratyev said. The falling debris sparked a fire in the building, injuring two people.
articles.title_raw: Russia downs more than 330 Ukrainian drones overnight; apartment building damaged, oil refinery catches fire

articles.title_en: AfD MP Frohnmayer: Germany should participate in negotiations on Nord Stream
articles.lead_en: The faction’s deputy leader and foreign policy expert noted that he would not want a situation where the Germans, “having spent €135 billion on Nord Stream, would then pay an American operating company for the opportunity to receive gas from Russia.”
articles.title_raw: Депутат АдГ Фронмайер: ФРГ должна участвовать в переговорах по "Северноиу потоку"
articles.lead_raw: Замруководителя, внешнеполитический эксперт фракции отметил, что не хотел бы ситуации, когда немцы, "потратив €135 млрд на "Северный поток", платили бы потом американской фирме-оператору за возможность получать газ из России"

articles.title_en: Enagás: Russia overtook the United States in LNG supplies to Spain in May
articles.lead_en: According to the Spanish energy company, the kingdom purchased the equivalent of 8,726 GWh of LNG from the Russian Federation

articles.title_en: A Russian died in a traffic accident in Alanya
articles.lead_en: A man driving a motorcycle collided with a minibus, Yeni Alanya newspaper writes.

articles.lead_raw: Мужчина, управляя мотоциклом, столкнулся с микроавтобусом, пишет газета Yeni Alanya

articles.title_en: Crimea hotel offered guests gasoline as a booking perk. The promotion was canceled four days later — the fuel ran out.
articles.lead_en: A spa hotel in the occupied Crimean city of Saky offered guests between 10 and 20 liters of gasoline as a booking incentive, then canceled the promotion after four days when the fuel ran out, the Russian Telegram news channel Ostorozhno Novosti reported.

articles.lead_en: Ukrainian drones and missiles struck Russian regions and occupied Crimea overnight on June 10. Russia’s Defense Ministry said air defense forces shot down 326 drones.
